overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a stormy forest at night, transitioning from wilderness near a lake into a rural village with wooden buildings. The atmosphere is dark and moody with fog, rain, and low visibility.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through grassy forest terrain with a lake visible to the right

entered.detail: Dense pine trees surrounding the area with dark green foliage
Dark water body visible through the trees on the right side
Green grass and undergrowth covering the forest floor
Decaying logs and branches scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, stormy forest at night. Geralt walks through grassy wilderness with dense coniferous trees surrounding the area. A lake is visible to the right through the mist. The atmosphere is moody and isolated with low visibility due to fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path through dense woods

events.description: mountain range becomes visible through the trees as the forest opens up ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through increasingly dense forest corridor

entered.detail: Distant mountain peaks visible through gaps in the forest canopy

segments.scene_description: Geralt follows a narrow dirt trail deeper into the forest. The path becomes more enclosed by trees forming a corridor-like effect. Around the 30-second mark, distant mountains become visible through the mist and trees ahead, signaling a transition in the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village square with wooden structures

events.description: exits forest and enters the outskirts of a rural village with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking into the village center, passing wooden houses and approaching villagers near a campfire

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden building entrance
villager near a wooden cart in the village square

entered.detail: Traditional wooden village house with dark timber walls and sloped roof
Low stone wall running alongside the village path
Wooden wagon or cart parked in the village square
Burning fire providing warm orange light in the dark village square

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a rural village as Geralt leaves the forest behind. Wooden farmhouses line the dirt path, and a stone wall appears on the right. The scene becomes more populated with NPC villagers visible near buildings and a campfire burning in the square, providing the first artificial light source in the stormy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, stormy forest that gradually opens into a dimly lit rural village. It begins in a moody, isolated wilderness where Geralt walks through dense coniferous trees and mist beside a quiet lake. As he follows a narrow dirt trail, the forest closes in to form a corridor of trees before the landscape begins to shift, revealing distant mountains through the fog ahead. The scene then expands as the forest thins, transitioning into a village where wooden farmhouses and a stone wall line the path. Finally, the environment becomes more populated with villagers and the warm glow of a campfire, providing the first artificial light against the stormy night.
